description_long: This object is a stylized grave monument featuring a central tombstone with a cross at the top, flanked by two smaller stone posts connected by decorative metal chains. The main tombstone is rectangular with a peaked top and a recessed area on the front, which displays an inscription in a script resembling Arabic. The two side posts are squat and pyramid-shaped, anchoring the chains that drape between them and the central monument. The entire structure is rendered in a dark, weathered blue stone with patches of rust and wear, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The metal chains are angular and geometric, adding a modern touch to the otherwise traditional grave marker. The monument is designed to be a prominent feature in a graveyard or cemetery setting.
description: A weathered blue stone grave monument with a cross, flanked by two chained side posts and an inscribed front panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cross-topped tombstone, inscribed panel, and both chained side posts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the central monument and the angular chain extending to one side post.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the tombstone and both side posts with chains.
description_view_3: Angled side view focusing on the chain and one of the side posts, with the cross visible in profile.
